text:
Evangelion Wind Symphony is a two-disc collection of tracks from the original series arranged for a brass band.
The albums were published by King Records via its label STARCHILD with the catalog numbers KIZC-41/2 and KIZC-43/4. They were both released on 09 December 2009. http://vgmdb.net/album/20059 

The music was arranged by Masamichi Amano, Yoichi Murata, and Shirō Sagisu. It was performed by the Tokyo Kosei Wind Orchestra. http://vgmdb.net/album/20068
